methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Skyeton is a growth-stage company in Defense & Security founded by Roman Knyazhenko. The valuation analysis draws from a Defense & Security comp universe of 21 same-sector peers, including 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms. Top private comparables include Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

The peer-median approach was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage peers meeting narrow screening criteria. Specifically, the analysis identified zero same-stage comparables, one adjacent-stage comparable, and zero similar-valuation-tier matches—falling short of the minimum three-datapoint threshold required for reliable median-based triangulation. Relying on a broader all-sector median would introduce unacceptable sectoral heterogeneity and was therefore rejected in favor of maintaining analytical rigor.

Given the inapplicability of the primary comparable-company method, the valuation analysis cannot support a specific range at this time. The thinness of precisely comparable transactions in the growth-stage Defense & Security segment represents the primary constraint. A defensible valuation would require either (1) expansion to adjacent-stage or adjacent-sector peers with transparent pricing; (2) access to transaction-level data on the named private peers; or (3) application of alternative methods such as discounted cash flow analysis using disclosed financial metrics. Until such data constraints are addressed, no numerical range can be responsibly derived.
